description: Two changes in ir_codegen.rs. (1) compile_with_backend after inline_module: call crate::ir_fuse::fuse_blocks(&mut working) before type_module so typer sees merged blocks. (2) lower_prim BinOp handler before iadd emit: add int_singleton check on fn_types.vars[dest_var]; if singleton return LowerOut::RawI64(iconst(n)). Add fn int_singleton(d: &Descr) -> Option<i64>: !d.ints.cofinite && d.ints.set.len()==1 with no other axes.
title: fz-ul4.fus.3: pipeline wiring + singleton fold in lower_prim
